form.formComment: Last start winner at Warragul over 400m running a time of 23.27 despite jumping slowly. Solid chance with even luck.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in her races, The latest effort was a 3.5 lengths seventh over 460m at Warragul. Tested under these conditions.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (29.25) in a Mix 6/7, finishing a 7 length second. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from two starts. Looks a key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Most recently finished last over 460m at Warragul beaten 4.5 lengths (26.48) behind Marshal Lee Rose in a Mix 6/7 on April 14. Mixing her form but shapes as a genuine chance under these conditions.
